title: Record: 11L + Partial XSA + TTT + BatchOpt (val_bpb=1.1354)
body:
## Summary

- **val_bpb: 1.1354** (sliding window, stride=64)
- 15.85 MB artifact (int6 + zstd-22, under 16MB)
- 8xH100 SXM, 8,945 steps in 600s + 132s eval

## Approach

Four improvements stacked on the PR #198 base:

1. **Partial XSA** (last 3 layers) — efficient GQA-aware self-attention debiasing (PR #265, arXiv:2603.09078)
2. **TTT** (3-epoch full-model SGD, freeze first 2 blocks) — eval-time adaptation (PR #254)
3. **Batch=524K** — 22% more gradient updates (PR #236 finding)
4. **RoPE base 50K** — extended positional encoding (PR #206)

## Key Metrics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Sliding val_bpb (stride=64)** | **1.1354** |
| Standard roundtrip val_bpb | 1.1583 |
| Artifact size | 15,851,371 bytes |
| Training steps | 8,945 |
| TTT time | 50s |
| Eval time | 80s |

## Note

Uses PyTorch SDPA fallback (FA3 not in RunPod image — see #280). With FA3, expect ~600 more training steps and slightly better BPB.

## Test plan

- [x] Artifact under 16MB (15.85MB)
- [x] Trains in 600s on 8xH100
- [x] Eval completes in <600s (132s total)
- [x] Post-quant roundtrip verified
- [x] train_gpt.py runs from records/ folder
- [x] Train log included
- [ ] Multi-seed validation (budget constrained — single seed)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
